sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41668" key="e)pixrhsimeu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιχρησῐμεύω</orth>, <sense id="n41668.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">make more effective,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Al.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">O.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
